title: Right Against Workplace Sexual Harassment
summary: Women have the right to a safe working environment free from sexual harassment.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Any unwelcome sexual behavior at the workplace is illegal.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Every workplace must have a complaint mechanism.

acts.name: Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act

exampleScenario.situation: A manager sends repeated inappropriate messages to an intern.
exampleScenario.explanation: Digital harassment is covered under POSH.
